response:
```python
import pytest

def gcd(a: int, b: int) -> int:
    while b:
        a, b = b, a % b
    return abs(a)

def test_gcd_positive_numbers():
    assert gcd(12, 18) == 6
    assert gcd(48, 18) == 6
    assert gcd(10, 15) == 5
    assert gcd(35, 49) == 7

def test_gcd_one_number_is_zero():
    assert gcd(10, 0) == 10
    assert gcd(0, 10) == 10
    assert gcd(0, 0) == 0

def test_gcd_negative_numbers():
    assert gcd(-12, 18) == 6
    assert gcd(12, -18) == 6
    assert gcd(-12, -18) == 6
    assert gcd(-48, 18) == 6
    assert gcd(48, -18) == 6
    assert gcd(-48, -18) == 6

def test_gcd_one_number_is_one():
    assert gcd(1, 10) == 1
    assert gcd(10, 1) == 1
    assert gcd(1, -10) == 1
    assert gcd(-10, 1) == 1
    assert gcd(-1, 10) == 1
    assert gcd(10, -1) == 1
    assert gcd(-1, -10) == 1
    assert gcd(-10, -1) == 1

def test_gcd_numbers_are_equal():
    assert gcd(5, 5) == 5
    assert gcd(-5, -5) == 5
    assert gcd(0, 0) == 0

def test_gcd_large_numbers():
    assert gcd(1071, 462) == 21
    assert gcd(252, 105) == 21
    assert gcd(600, 134) == 2

def test_gcd_one_number_is_a_multiple_of_the_other():
    assert gcd(24, 8) == 8
    assert gcd(8, 24) == 8
    assert gcd(-24, 8) == 8
    assert gcd(8, -24) == 8
    assert gcd(-24, -8) == 8
    assert gcd(-8, -24) == 8
```
